zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar於大約1240年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾時，她的父親Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland24歲，母親Elizabeth de Quincy21歲。她和Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick至少有1個兒子。她去世於1308年10月10日在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar was born about 1240, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, was 24 and her mother, Elizabeth de Quincy, was 21. She had at least 1 son with Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick. She died on 10 October 1308, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar est née environ 1240, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Quincy, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick. Elle est décédée le 10 octobre 1308, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 69 ans.

Sie hatte mit Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 10. Oktober 1308 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar(이)가 대략 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Quincy(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1308년 10월 10일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar родилась около 1240 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Comyn 6th Earl of Buchan, Constable and Justiciar of Scotland было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Quincy, 21. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick. Она умерла 10 октября 1308 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 69 лет.
